en.name: Level 27 — The Bunker Springs
en.shortDescription: A small cave with a mineral-rich hot spring that soothes and heals wanderers — while hiding a darker secret further in.
en.atmosphere: Serene and therapeutic at first, concealing an unsettling truth about the level's true nature and its edges.
en.tips: Bathe 1–2 hours at most for the benefits. Avoid the second waterfall tunnel. Respect others and leave promptly.
